channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Hacker News] Apple Foundation Models
item.description: Apple Foundation Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Can Editing 1 Neuron Fix Repetition Loops in LLMs?
item.description: Editing specific MLP neurons suppresses repetition loops in Gemma 4 LLMs for standard generation, but the model still doom-loops during extended thinking.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Efficient On-Device Diffusion LLM Inference with Mobile NPU
item.description: llada.cpp framework accelerates diffusion language model inference on mobile devices using NPU-optimized speculative decoding and memory management.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] High-Frequency Pricing at Scale for E-Commerce
item.description: Zalando deployed an algorithmic pricing system using demand forecasting and multi-objective optimization, achieving 6% profit increase with faster pricing decisions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A fully GPU-based workflow for building physics emulators of hypersonic flows
item.description: Researchers develop fully GPU-based physics emulators for hypersonic flows using neural networks enhanced with residual-based refinement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FedSPC: Shared Parameter Correction for Personalized Federated Learning
item.description: FedSPC corrects shared parameter inconsistencies in personalized federated learning, improving performance across multiple PFL methods including FedPer, FedRep, and Ditto.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Weight Norm Sets the Grokking Timescale: A Causal Delay Law
item.description: Critical weight norm determines neural network grokking timescale, with delay scaling exponentially across modular bases.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] D2H-AD: A Hybrid Model Utilizing Hyperdimensional Computing for Advanced Anomaly Detection
item.description: D2H-AD is a hyperdimensional computing framework for anomaly detection that outperforms established baselines while offering efficiency suitable for resource-constrained applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond LoRA: Is Sparsity-Induced Adaptation Better?
item.description: Researchers propose sparse LoRA variants that maintain competitive performance while reducing parameters and computational cost.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Diffusion Policy Optimization without Drifting Apart
item.description: DiPOD addresses double-drift in diffusion policy optimization through self-distillation and ELBO regularization, stabilizing training and improving policy rewards.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Variability Enhances Artificial Network Robustness
item.description: Structured noise correlations in artificial neural networks enhance robustness to adversarial attacks and naturalistic image modifications, with better generalization from adversarial sources.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Slack Variables for Shape Constraints
item.description: Neural slack variables convert constraint enforcement into regression using auxiliary networks, eliminating violations in monotonicity and convexity constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Uncertainty Estimation and Generalization Bounds for Modern Deep Learning
item.description: Research proposes Bayesian methods and theoretical framework to improve uncertainty estimation and explain generalization in deep neural networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Attention-Based Estimation of the Individual Treatment Benefit Probability under Dose Variation
item.description: Dose-AIPTB framework uses attention mechanisms to estimate individual patient benefit probability across treatment doses for personalized clinical dose selection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Stationarity-and-Coupling Criterion for Training-Free Time-Lagged Spectral Embeddings of Multivariate Time Series
item.description: Research proposes a criterion for predicting when training-free time-lagged spectral embeddings effectively classify multivariate time series based on stationarity and cross-channel temporal coupling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SuperThoughts: Reasoning Tokens in Superposition
item.description: SuperThoughts compresses consecutive chain-of-thought tokens to generate two per step, achieving 20-30% CoT length reduction with minimal accuracy loss.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Muon$^p$: Muon with Fractional Spectral Powers
item.description: Muon^p optimizer improves large model finetuning by using fractional spectral powers instead of full spectrum flattening.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Natively Unlearnable Large Language Models
item.description: NULLs is an LLM architecture using shared backbone neurons and source-specific sinks to enable efficient unlearning of individual training data sources at deployment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Longitudinal Attribute-Conditioned Neural Network for Modeling Health-State Transition Probabilities in Temporally Irregular Data: The LANTERN Framework
item.description: LANTERN neural network estimates health state transition probabilities from irregular longitudinal data for disability insurance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gefen: Optimized Stochastic Optimizer
item.description: Gefen is a memory-efficient optimizer reducing AdamW's memory footprint by 8x while maintaining performance through shared second-moment estimates and first-moment quantization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SpikF-GO: Spiking Fourier Graph Operators for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
item.description: SpikF-GO combines spiking neural networks with Fourier graph operators to model inter-variable dependencies in multivariate time series forecasting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Smoothing Dark Areas in Molecular Latent Diffusion
item.description: TopVAE improves molecular latent diffusion by reducing invalid molecule generation through decoder-integrated chemical constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Can Machine Learning Forecast Rice Yields in Data-Constrained Settings? Satellite Climate Data, National Crop Statistics, and Lessons from Sierra Leone
item.description: Machine learning forecasts Sierra Leone rice yields more accurately using satellite climate data, with early-season rainfall as the dominant predictor.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PostDeg: Placement Beats Parameterization in LayerNorm GNNs
item.description: PostDeg demonstrates placement of topology-preserving scalars after LayerNorm improves GNNs more than parameterization on influence maximization and network optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Utility-Constrained Policy Optimization
item.description: Utility-constrained MDPs framework enables risk-sensitive safety constraints in RL with flexible, post-training constraint adjustments and improved benchmark performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Decompose Sparsely Where You Should, Absorb Densely Where You Should No
item.description: Sparse autoencoders contain a low-rank dense component unsuitable for sparse decomposition; a parallel bottleneck reduces dense latents by 84% while improving probing performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Non-Parametric Machine Text Detection via Multi-View Gaussian Processes
item.description: A multi-view Gaussian process framework detects machine-generated text by aggregating evidence across complementary features, providing robustness against adversarial attacks and paraphrasing.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rethinking Backdoor Adversarial Unlearning through the Lens of Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual Learning
item.description: BI-BAU formulates backdoor unlearning as a continual learning problem using catastrophic forgetting mechanisms to eliminate backdoor effects from neural networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Deep Spectral Learning of Embedded Latent Transfer Operators for Stochastic Dynamical Systems
item.description: Deep Spectral Encoder uses neural feature maps and transfer operators to learn latent representations of stochastic dynamical systems, outperforming Bayesian filtering baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Lyapunov-Based Sample Complexity Analysis for Weakly-Coupled MDPs
item.description: Novel Lyapunov-based analysis framework achieves polynomial sample complexity for learning near-optimal policies in weakly-coupled MDPs and Restless Bandits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Numbers Already Carry Their Own Embeddings
item.description: Adelic operation-preserved embeddings enable training-free number representations that preserve additive and multiplicative structure, improving algebraic combinatorics benchmark performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Coin Flip Judge? Reliability and Bias in LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation
item.description: LLM-as-a-Judge evaluations show high instability with 13.6% average pairwise-preference flip rate, first-position bias, and only 76% cross-judge agreement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Benchmarking Web Agent Safety under E-commerce Deceptive Interfaces
item.description: Web agents are highly vulnerable to deceptive e-commerce interfaces including domain redirects, ads, and shopping manipulation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Which Models Perform Better in Inheritance Reasoning?
item.description: Commercial language models outperform open-source models on Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning tasks, with Gemini 2.5 Flash achieving best results.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] QIAS 2026: Overview of the Shared Task on Islamic Inheritance Reasoning
item.description: QIAS 2026 shared task evaluates language models on Islamic inheritance reasoning using MAWARITH benchmark, with 16 teams finding the task highly challenging for current LLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Culture Funnel: You Can't Align What isn't in the Data
item.description: LLM pipelines lose cultural diversity during post-training due to concentrated data; training data restructuring, not inference fixes, is essential.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Plausible Is Not Realistic: Evaluating Human Mobility in LLM-Based Urban Simulation
item.description: LLM-based urban simulators produce plausible but unrealistic human mobility patterns, failing to capture real spatial and temporal constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hybrid Classical-Quantum Variational Autoencoder for Neural Topic Modeling
item.description: Hybrid classical-quantum VAE outperforms state-of-the-art neural topic models while operating on low-resource quantum hardware.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SANA: What Matters for QA Agents over Massive Data Lakes?
item.description: SANA framework uses ablation to diagnose which components—search, planning, data analysis, policy—cause QA agent failures over data lakes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DLawBench: Evaluating LLMs Through Multi-Turn Legal Consultation
item.description: DLawBench, a new legal consultation benchmark, evaluates 26 LLMs across 461 multi-turn cases; best model achieves 0.562 on legal reasoning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can Post-Training Turn LLMs into Good Medical Coders? An Empirical Study of Generative ICD Coding
item.description: Supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning enable LLMs to achieve strong automated medical ICD coding performance, exceeding prompting-only approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LLMs Contain Multitudes: How Deployment Context Reshapes Model-Level Preferences and Values
item.description: Study shows deployment context significantly alters LLM preferences and values across 1.2M decisions, more than prompt perturbations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MedLatentDx: Latent Multi-Agent Communication for Cross-Hospital Rare-Disease Diagnosis
item.description: Cross-hospital rare disease diagnosis framework shares latent KV blocks between agents instead of sensitive clinical text to preserve privacy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Creative Integration: A Decidable Criterion of Creativity
item.description: Researchers establish a decidable criterion for creative integration: solutions that genuinely reduce description length when resolving conflicts, validated empirically.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fusing Stylometric and Embedding Systems to Estimate Authorship Likelihood Ratios in Japanese
item.description: Researchers fuse stylometric and embedding-based systems for Japanese authorship attribution using forensic likelihood ratio framework, improving discriminability while maintaining calibration.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Holistic Storage of Verb+Up Phrases in Text-based and Audio-based Language Models
item.description: LLMs and ASR models store multi-word phrasal verbs holistically based on frequency and predictability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Dialogue SWE-Bench: A Benchmark for Dialogue-Driven Coding Agents
item.description: Dialogue SWE-Bench benchmark for evaluating coding agents through user dialogue finds that dialogue capability is independent of underlying model quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Right or Wrong, Models Comply: Directional Blindness in LLM Moral Judgment
item.description: Language models follow beneficial and harmful nudges at equal rates on moral questions but resist harmful ones on facts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Harsher on Male? Evaluating LLMs on Gender-Asymmetric Moral Framing Across Diverse Conflict Scenarios
item.description: Research shows LLMs consistently apply harsher moral judgment to male actors and more empathetic responses to female actors for identical negative behaviors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond Perplexity: UTF-8 Validity in Byte-aware Language Models
item.description: Byte-aware language models require 4.2B training tokens for reliable UTF-8 generation versus 2.1B for perplexity convergence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Implicit Reasoning for Large Language Model-based Generative Recommendation
item.description: PauseRec proposes implicit reasoning for LLM-based recommendations, improving performance by 6.22% while reducing training costs by 65%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Personal Care Utility: Health as Everyday Infrastructure
item.description: Paper proposes Personal Care Utility, an event-driven architecture leveraging personal data and LLMs to support continuous health management between clinical visits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CacheRL:Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Agents via Cached Rollouts and Hybrid Reward
item.description: CacheRL system trains small models to 92% accuracy on multi-step tool-calling tasks using cached rollouts and 100x less compute than GPT-5.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] OdysSim: Building Foundation Models for Human Behavior Simulation
item.description: OdysSim introduces a framework for training behavioral foundation models to simulate human behavior, with an 8B model achieving top performance on social and conversational tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Detecting undisclosed LLM-generated content in parliamentary texts
item.description: Researchers detect increasing undisclosed LLM-generated content in UK and Swedish parliamentary texts since 2022 using interpretable classifiers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Decoupled Mixture-of-Experts for Parametric Knowledge Injection
item.description: Researchers propose Decoupled Mixture-of-Experts, a modular architecture that injects domain-specific knowledge into language models while avoiding catastrophic forgetting and enabling efficient inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Linguistics Olympiads: Towards a New Corpus for Linguistics Research?
item.description: Research examines Linguistics Olympiad Problems as a potential corpus for academic linguistics and computational linguistics research.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Does the Judge Prefer English? Evaluating Language-Switching Invariance in LLM-as-a-Judge
item.description: LLM judges show language bias, with 10.7-14.4% preference flips when comparing answers presented in Chinese or mixed-language versus English.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Retrospective Progress-Aware Self-Refinement for LLM Agent Training
item.description: RePro framework enables LLM agents to self-assess progress retrospectively during training, improving long-horizon task performance by up to 12%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Achieving Precise Text-To-Cypher Via Grounded Knowledge Graph Data Generation
item.description: Automatic synthetic data generation lets small LLMs achieve performance parity with large proprietary models on Text-To-Cypher conversion.
